series_metadata.series_description: The electronic funds transfer allows the customer to automatically withdraw funds from a bank account to be saved in his College Savings fund. Confidential - Revised Code 3334.11.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Imaged files are retained permanently ; Paper: Retain records of electronid funds transfers until imaged and image is verified for quality and completeness then destroy. Older records not imaged will be retained for the life of the contract, Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Shred
